LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT LYFT, INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. A STIPULATION AND ORDER SUBMITTING CASE TO ARBITRATION AND STAYING PROCEEDINGS WAS SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/CK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LYFT, INC'S (UNOPPOSED) MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 2.550 AND 2.551 IS GRANTED. THE PROPOSED ORDER SHALL RECITE THE FACTORS SET OUT IN CRC 2.550(D). COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Mar-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records Pursuant To California Rules Of Court 2.550 And 2.551

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT LYFT, INC'S Motion To Seal Records Pursuant To California Rules Of Court 2.550 And 2.551, as follows:

Lyft, Inc.'s unopposed motion "to seal records pursuant to California Rules of Court 2.550 and 2.551" is granted. The proposed order shall recite the factors set out in CRC 2.550(d).

Counsel for the moving party shall prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.
